MINI MINUTES: Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Doris Yee is present.
Attorney Daniel Borenstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Felipe Mendieta is present.
Attorney Robert Kane representing the defendant through full scope.

The settlement attorney Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated
